response.justification: Strong full-stack engineer with excellent software craftsmanship fundamentals, but critically underqualified for the required 8+ years of production-grade AI solutions. Only ~6 months of AI/GenAI-specific experience (re:cinq MCP role). Missing demonstrated expertise in vector databases, RAG architectures, LLMs, Python, and data pipelines—all core requirements. Career gap since October 2025 is an additional concern.
strengths: Proven track record of shipping production systems at scale with strong emphasis on testing, CI/CD, and code quality across 16+ years
Recent hands-on experience with MCP and agentic workflows at re:cinq shows emerging engagement with the AI/GenAI domain
Multiple staff-level roles demonstrate senior IC capability and ability to mentor teams and drive technical excellence
concerns: Only ~6 months of AI/GenAI experience versus required 8+ years building production AI solutions—fundamental experience gap for staff-level role
No demonstrated expertise in vector databases, RAG architectures, LLM optimization, or data pipelines for structured/unstructured data—all specified requirements
Python not listed in skillset despite being required; 7-month career gap from October 2025 to present raises questions about engagement and continuity

key_factors.factor: Insufficient AI/production experience (6 months vs 8+ years required)
Missing core AI technologies (vector DB, RAG, Python, LLM expertise)
Strong general software engineering and systems foundation
